mnemonics: DOMAIN = Defining Operational Metrics And Integrating Norms
keyPoints: Domain theories provide background knowledge to guide the learning process
They help constrain the hypothesis space for more efficient learning
Incorporating domain knowledge can improve generalization and reduce data requirements
commonMistakes: Assuming domain theories must be perfect - they can be approximate or incomplete
Over-relying on domain knowledge at the expense of learning from data
Failing to properly formalize domain knowledge for machine consumption
